eng-global-json-2026-06-21.description: Add global.json to pin .NET SDK to 10.0.x (Closes #62)

improve-cache-json-options-2026-06-21.description: Cache JsonSerializerOptions as static readonly fields in AppSettings

fix-all-monitors-color-temp.description: Fix: apply current colour temperature when enabling all-monitors mode (Closes #57)

fix-hotkey-feedback.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails (Closes #59)

test-appsettings-2026-06-22.description: Add AppSettings unit test project (xUnit, 12 tests, all passing - Closes #54)

perf-mouse-hook-2026-06-22.description: Perf: reduce GC pressure from WH_MOUSE_LL hook - pre-allocate delegate, coalesce dispatches, cache hole-punch geometry (Closes #48)

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs (LerpColor, ApplyDisplayAffinity) as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.
notes: 2026-06-22 14:41 run: Task8 - created PR for WH_MOUSE_LL perf improvements from existing branch (pre-allocate delegate + coalesce dispatches + cache geometry, Closes #48). Task2 - no new human issues; only #24 already commented, no new activity. Updated monthly summary #74.
